prose:
I performed a frontier-orbitals calculation on the TEMPO molecule using Density Functional Theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard'). The calculation was performed in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 2. The SCF calculation converged in 12 cycles. The resulting frontier orbital energies are:
HOMO: -6.3375439 eV
LUMO: -2.4651235 eV
